description_long: This is a low-profile, casual sneaker with a dark navy blue leather upper and contrasting beige accents on the heel collar and laces. The shoe features a series of small perforations along the side panels, likely for ventilation, and visible white stitching that outlines the panels and adds a subtle decorative touch. The lacing system uses standard eyelets and beige laces in a criss-cross pattern. The outsole is a thin, light brown rubber, slightly textured for grip, and the heel and toe areas show gentle curves for ergonomic fit. The interior appears lightly padded, especially around the collar, providing comfort for everyday urban wear. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A dark navy blue leather sneaker with beige accents, perforated side panels, and beige laces, designed for casual urban use. The shoe features visible stitching and a thin, light brown rubber sole.
description_view_0: The left side and heel of the shoe are visible, highlighting the beige heel collar, perforated side panel, and the curve of the sole.
description_view_1: The rear and left side of the shoe are shown, emphasizing the rounded heel, beige collar, and the seam running up the back.
description_view_2: The right side and front of the shoe are visible, showing the lacing system, perforated side panel, and the smooth toe cap.
description_view_3: The front and right side of the shoe are shown, focusing on the toe box, criss-cross lacing, and the overall streamlined shape.
